title: Rust Kani bounds check
description: Unsafe Rust changes must not introduce out-of-bounds memory access on privileged paths.

property.natural_language: Array and pointer accesses in changed Rust code remain within declared bounds.
property.formal_hint: forall i. 0 <= i < len(arr) implies safe_access(arr, i)

risk.rationale: Memory safety regressions in auth paths are exploitable.
